## page_title: "k0s_cluster Data Source - k0s" subcategory: "" description: |- Read an existing k0s cluster by container name.

# k0s_cluster (Data Source)

Read an existing k0s cluster by container name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "k0s_cluster" "example" {
  name        = "my-cluster"
  version     = "v1.32.2-k0s.0"
  single_node = true
}

data "k0s_cluster" "example" {
  name = k0s_cluster.example.name
}

output "status" {
  value = data.k0s_cluster.example.status
}

output "kubeconfig" {
  value     = data.k0s_cluster.example.kubeconfig
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Docker container name of the cluster.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Docker container name / unique identifier.
- `image` (String) OCI image reference used by the container.
- `kubeconfig` (String, Sensitive) Kubeconfig contents for accessing the cluster.
- `single_node` (Boolean) Whether the cluster was created as single-node.
- `status` (String) Container status (running, exited, etc.).
- `version` (String) k0s version running in the cluster.
